project_type: Static multi-page website (HTML/CSS/JS pure, no frameworks)
build_system: None - static files served directly. Deployed via Vercel (vercel.json present with cleanUrls enabled)
test_framework: None - manual browser testing, HTML validation
build_command: N/A - static site, no build step required
verification_instructions: Open index.html in browser. Verify all pages load, navigation works, responsive design functions on mobile/tablet/desktop. Check all internal links resolve correctly.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - pure HTML/CSS/JS. Files can be served with any HTTP server or opened directly in browser.
environment_constraints: No build tools, no npm, no frameworks. Pure HTML/CSS/JS only. Google Fonts loaded from CDN (Cormorant Garamond + Inter). Vercel deployment with cleanUrls (no .html extensions needed in links).
contribution_requirements: Keep design premium with black/gold palette. Use Cormorant Garamond for headings, Inter for body. No promises of profitability. No financial advice framing. Educational and transparent language. Guide users toward contact with Kepa.

key_patterns.css_architecture: Single CSS file with CSS custom properties (variables) in :root. BEM-like naming. Sections numbered in comments. Responsive with mobile-first breakpoints at 420px, 720px, 980px.
key_patterns.js_architecture: Single JS file, vanilla JS with DOMContentLoaded wrapper. IntersectionObserver for scroll reveals. No libraries.
key_patterns.html_structure: Semantic HTML5 with aria labels. .container wrapper for max-width. .reveal class for scroll animations. .section and .section--alt for alternating backgrounds.
key_patterns.design_tokens: Colors: --black (#0b0b0d), --gold (#c9a24b), --gold-gradient (135deg metallic). Fonts: --font-display (Cormorant Garamond), --font-body (Inter). Border-radius: 16px (--radius). Nav height: 78px.
key_patterns.buttons: .btn base with .btn--primary (gold gradient) and .btn--ghost (transparent with border). Rounded pill shape (border-radius: 100px).
key_patterns.navigation: Fixed navbar with backdrop-filter blur. .is-scrolled state on scroll. Mobile hamburger menu slides from right.
key_patterns.whatsapp: Floating WhatsApp button fixed bottom-right. Phone: 34600000000 (placeholder - needs real number from sobre-mi.html which shows 34611918310).

relevant_files: frontend/index.html - current premium landing page (USE AS DESIGN REFERENCE)
frontend/style.css - full CSS with variables and responsive design (USE AS BASE)
frontend/script.js - vanilla JS interactions (USE AS BASE)
frontend/images/ - existing images (caja-fuerte.jpg, dinero.jpg, kepa.jpg, lingotes-equipo.jpg, oro.jpg, plata.jpg, vault-banner.jpg)
sobre-mi.html - old 'about Kepa' page with content about Kepa Bilbao, AUVESTA collaboration, values (USE FOR CONTENT REFERENCE)
lead-magnet.html - old lead capture page (USE FOR CONTENT IDEAS)
gracias.html - old thank you page (reference only)
vercel.json - deployment config with cleanUrls enabled
directory_structure: Root level has old standalone HTML pages and markdown marketing docs. frontend/ folder contains the new premium version (index.html, style.css, script.js, images/). The V1.0 rebuild should restructure the frontend/ folder as the primary site root with multiple pages.
kepa_info: Kepa Bilbao, based in Bilbao Spain. Official collaborator of AUVESTA Edelmetalle AG (German company, 17+ years, 200k+ investors in 134 countries). Helps people save in physical precious metals (gold, silver, platinum, palladium) from 25 EUR/month. Metals stored in Zurich.
